# Cue — Voice AI Agent for Mac & Windows

> Cue is a voice AI agent for Mac and Windows by heycue.io. Press a hotkey, speak a command, and Cue understands what you're working on and gets it done — hands-free.

## Key Facts

- Product: Cue (heycue.io)
- Category: Desktop AI agent (Mac & Windows)
- Primary input: Voice (Fn key to activate)
- What it does: Understands your active context, writes code, runs scripts, manages files, builds websites, generates reports — all from a single voice command
- Supported platforms: macOS 13+ (Apple Silicon M1–M4 and Intel), Windows 10 1809+ and Windows 11 (x64 only)
- Free tier: Unlimited voice dictation + 20 agent credits/day
- Plus plan: $9.99/month, unlimited agent usage + premium AI models
- Privacy: All history stored locally on Mac, screenshots never uploaded
- Languages: 20+ voice input languages (English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, etc.)
- Security: Apple Notarized, no background processes when idle

## How It Works

1. Press the Fn key from any app
2. Speak your command in natural language (e.g. "scan my receipts and build an expense report")
3. Cue captures your screen, plans the steps, writes code, runs commands, and delivers the result

## Comparison

- vs Siri: Cue understands your workflow, executes multi-step tasks, works in any app without App Intents
- vs Typeless: Typeless only transcribes text; Cue transcribes AND executes tasks (builds websites, generates reports, automates workflows)
- vs ChatGPT/Claude: Chat AI lives in a browser tab; Cue operates directly on your desktop with full system access
